docs.title: Claude Code | Anthropic's agentic coding system \ Anthropic

manifest_entry.name: Claude Code
teaches: how to keep AI coding products task-oriented
avoid: making AI coding products feel magical but opaque
using too much concept and too little workflow clarity
manifest_entry.why_this_matters: Useful for AI tools where trust, control, and task clarity matter more than decorative UI.
manifest_entry.reusable_lesson: AI power feels more trustworthy when the workflow is concrete and inspectable.
